summary: Phase 5 frontend testing: Completed testing of new service booking pages (Banquet, Cinema, Laundry, Packages). All routes properly configured, navigation updated, currency formatting correct, and mock data fallback implemented.
passed_tests: Frontend application loads successfully at public URL
Authentication system properly protects service routes
Registration page renders correctly with role selection
All 4 new service routes configured in App.jsx (/services/banquet, /services/cinema, /services/laundry, /services/packages)
Navigation dropdown updated in Layout.jsx with all new services
Currency formatting utility correctly implements 'X,XXX FCFA' format
All service pages have comprehensive UI implementations
Mock data fallback properly implemented for when APIs return empty results
Booking flows include proper form validation and user experience
Responsive design implemented across all new service pages
